question: For the snooker players who participated in the 2002 Masters, sort them by their highest career ranking (lowest number first), and then by the number of Masters titles they had won by the end of the 2001/02 season (highest number first). How many Masters titles had the third player in this sorted list won by the end of the 2001/02 season

Sort the Australian rules football clubs that were competing in the Victorian Football League in 1913 or 1944 by their total number of Victorian Football League or Australian Football League Grand Final losses from fewest to most. What is the number of Grand Final losses for the club that ranks second in this sorted list
sparql:
SELECT ?club ?losses WHERE {
  ?club p:P1264 [ ps:P1264 wd:Q148624 ; pq:P580 ?start ; pq:P582 ?end ] .
  FILTER((?start <= "1913-01-01" ^^ xsd:date && ?end >= "1913-01-01" ^^ xsd:date) ||(?start <= "1944-01-01" ^^ xsd:date && ?end >= "1944-01-01" ^^ xsd:date))
  .
  ?club wdt:P3347 ?losses .
}
ORDER BY ?losses
LIMIT 2

Sort the teams that have played against Collingwood in a Grand Final by the year of their first Grand Final appearance against Collingwood, from earliest to latest. What was the year of the first Grand Final against Collingwood for the team ranked fourth in this list
sparql:
SELECT ?opponent(MIN(?year) AS ?firstYear) WHERE {
  ?event wdt:P31 wd:Q204147 ; wdt:P585 ?year .
  ?event wdt:P135 wd:Q581614 .
  ?event wdt:P135 ?opponent .
  FILTER(?opponent != wd:Q581614)
}
GROUP BY ?opponent
ORDER BY MIN(?year)
OFFSET 3
LIMIT 1

question: Sort the players who participated in the 2002 Masters snooker competition by their year of birth from oldest to youngest, and then alphabetically by last name for those with the same year of birth. What is the year of birth of the sixth player in this sorted list
sparql: SELECT (YEAR(?dob) AS ?yearOfBirth) ?lastName WHERE { ?event wdt:P31 wd:Q200080; wdt:P585 ?date; FILTER (YEAR(?date) = 2002); ?player wdt:P2045 ?event; ?player wdt:P569 ?dob; ?player wdt:P734 ?lastName. } ORDER BY ASC(YEAR(?dob)) ASC(?lastName) LIMIT 6

question: Sort the attendance figures for all games played between the Pittsburgh Pirates and the Cincinnati Reds in the National League Championship Series from 1972 through 1979 from highest to lowest. What is the attendance figure for the fifth game in this sorted list
sparql:
SELECT ?game ?attendance WHERE {
  ?series wdt:P31 wd:Q19155 ; wdt:P585 ?seriesDate .
  FILTER(YEAR(?seriesDate) >= 1972 && YEAR(?seriesDate) <= 1979)
  ?game wdt:P1545 ?series ; wdt:P1647 ?homeTeam ; wdt:P1648 ?awayTeam ; wdt:P8598 ?attendance .
  FILTER((?homeTeam = wd:Q336343 && ?awayTeam = wd:Q152865) ||(?homeTeam = wd:Q152865 && ?awayTeam = wd:Q336343))
}
ORDER BY DESC(?attendance)
LIMIT 5

question: Sort all games played between the Los Angeles Dodgers and the Philadelphia Phillies in the 1977, 1978, 2008, and 2009 National League Championship Series by game duration from longest to shortest. What was the duration in minutes of the third longest game

  ?duration psn:P520 ?durationValue .
  FILTER(YEAR(?date) IN(1977 , 1978 , 2008 , 2009))
}
ORDER BY DESC(?durationValue)
LIMIT 1
OFFSET 2

sparql: SELECT (COUNT(CASE WHEN ?winner = wd:Q11189092 THEN 1 END) AS ?luna_count) (COUNT(CASE WHEN ?winner = wd:Q2799296 THEN 1 END) AS ?nz_count) (COUNT(CASE WHEN ?winner = wd:Q11189092 THEN 1 END) - COUNT(CASE WHEN ?winner = wd:Q2799296 THEN 1 END)) AS ?difference WHERE { ?event rdfs:label ?label . FILTER (lang(?label) = 'en') . VALUES ?label { '2000 Louis Vuitton Cup' '2000 America's Cup' '2011 Extreme Sailing Series' '2021 Prada Cup' '2021 America's Cup' } . ?event wdt:P161 ?winner . }

question: Sort the attendance figures from all games played between the Los Angeles Dodgers and Philadelphia Phillies in the 1977, 1978, 2008, and 2009 National League Championship Series from highest to lowest. What is the third highest attendance figure
sparql:
SELECT ?attendance WHERE {
  ?series a wd:Q37704 .
  ?series wdt:P452 wd:Q422841 .
  ?series wdt:P452 wd:Q149624 .
  ?game wdt:P154 ?series ; wdt:P1065 ?attendance .
  ?series wdt:P585 ?date .
  FILTER(regex(str(?date) , "^(1977|1978|2008|2009)-"))
}
ORDER BY DESC(?attendance)
LIMIT 1

question: Sort the people who worked for Brentford and were born on or before 1956 by their birth year from oldest to youngest. How many people in this sorted list have a total career appearances count listed in the table detailing Paul Smith's statistics
sparql:
SELECT(COUNT(?person) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?person wdt:P162 wd:Q175075 .
  ?person wdt:P569 ?birthDate .
  BIND(YEAR(?birthDate) AS ?birthYear)
  FILTER(?birthYear <= 1956)
  ?person wdt:P178 ?appearances
}

question: Among Kamilla Rytter Juhl, Zhao Yunlei, Christinna Pedersen, Tian Qing, Yu Yang, Wang Xiaoli, and Eom Hye-won, what is the greatest number of BWF Superseries runner-up finishes any of them had in the year 2013

Sort Lewis Hamilton's pole position qualifying times from the 2015 and 2016 Canadian Grands Prix from fastest to slowest. What was the Q3 time of the second race in this sorted list, expressed in milliseconds
sparql:
SELECT((xsd:float(?minutes) * 60 + xsd:float(?seconds)) * 1000 AS ?millis) WHERE {
  wd:Q5965 p:P1257 ?stmt .
  ?stmt ps:P1257 wd:Q1 ; ps:P3876 ?time ; pr:P805 ?race .
  ?race wdt:P31 wd:Q1182584 ; wdt:P131 wd:Q21835 ; wdt:P585 ?date .
  FILTER(YEAR(?date) IN(2015 , 2016))
  .
  BIND(STR(?time) AS ?timeStr)
  BIND(STRBEFORE(STRAFTER(?timeStr , "PT") , "M") AS ?minutes)
  BIND(STRBEFORE(STRAFTER(?timeStr , "M") , "S") AS ?seconds)
}
ORDER BY ASC(?millis)
LIMIT 1
OFFSET 1

question: Sort the years for which Canadian Grand Prix qualifying tables featuring Lewis Hamilton are provided by his Q3 qualifying time from fastest to slowest. What is the year of the second race in this sorted list

  ?statement ps:P2226 ?time .

  ?statement pq:P1556 wd:Q1459 .
}

LIMIT 2

What is the greatest number of wooden spoons achieved by either the Richmond Football Club or the Collingwood Football Club in the senior Australian Football League/Victorian Football League competition
sparql:
SELECT ?club ?clubLabel(COUNT(?award) AS ?count) WHERE {
  VALUES ?club {
    wd:Q159411 wd:Q159375
  }
  ?club rdfs:label ?clubLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?clubLabel) = 'en')
  ?club wdt:P166 ?award .
  ?award rdfs:label ?awardLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?awardLabel) = 'en')

}

LIMIT 1

question: What was the highest attendance for a single game in the National League Championship Series between the Los Angeles Dodgers and the Philadelphia Phillies across the 1977, 1978, 2008, and 2009 seasons
sparql:
SELECT MAX(?attendance) AS ?maxAttendance
WHERE {
  ?game wdt:P763 wd:Q1866320 .
  ?game wdt:P585 ?date .
  ?game wdt:P145 ?homeTeam ;
        wdt:P2140 ?awayTeam .
  ?game wdt:P11207 ?attendance .
  FILTER ( ( ?homeTeam = wd:Q129519 && ?awayTeam = wd:Q1174683 ) ||
           ( ?homeTeam = wd:Q1174683 && ?awayTeam = wd:Q129519 ) )
  FILTER ( math:YEAR(?date) IN (1977, 1978, 2008, 2009) )
}

sparql:
SELECT ?duration WHERE {
  {
    wd:Q215655 p:P39 ?positionStatement .
    ?positionStatement ps:P39 ?position .
    ?positionStatement pq:P580 ?startDate .
    ?positionStatement pq:P582 ?endDate .
    BIND((xsd:integer(SUBSTR(str(?startDate) , 1 , 4))) AS ?startYear)
    BIND((xsd:integer(SUBSTR(str(?endDate) , 1 , 4))) AS ?endYear)
    BIND(?endYear - ?startYear AS ?duration)
  } UNION {
    wd:Q506200 p:P39 ?positionStatement .
    ?positionStatement ps:P39 ?position .
    ?positionStatement pq:P580 ?startDate .
    ?positionStatement pq:P582 ?endDate .
    BIND((xsd:integer(SUBSTR(str(?startDate) , 1 , 4))) AS ?startYear)
    BIND((xsd:integer(SUBSTR(str(?endDate) , 1 , 4))) AS ?endYear)
    BIND(?endYear - ?startYear AS ?duration)
  }
}
ORDER BY DESC(?duration)
LIMIT 1
OFFSET 4
